criteria.label: Style authority and product context
criteria.pass_evidence: Reads project style authority before judging dashboard polish.
criteria.deduction_trigger: Applies stock dashboard styling without product context.

criteria.label: Reference selection
criteria.pass_evidence: Selects dashboard, taste, design-move, and validation references only as needed.
criteria.deduction_trigger: Loads unrelated references or ignores dashboard guidance.

criteria.label: Anti-generic redesign
criteria.pass_evidence: Diagnoses decision hierarchy instead of rearranging generic cards.
criteria.deduction_trigger: Uses gradients, equal cards, or template chrome as the main repair.

criteria.label: Evidence level labeling
criteria.pass_evidence: Labels screenshot, browser, responsive, or before/after evidence.
criteria.deduction_trigger: Gives a precise score while hiding missing runtime evidence.

criteria.label: Verified/unverified boundary
criteria.pass_evidence: Separates visible hierarchy issues from unverified interaction states.
criteria.deduction_trigger: Claims interaction or mobile quality without evidence.

criteria.label: Concrete design moves
criteria.pass_evidence: Proposes lead metric, support strip, work area, and exception queue moves.
criteria.deduction_trigger: Gives vague cleanup advice without implementable structure.

criteria.label: Scope control and unrelated changes
criteria.pass_evidence: Keeps recommendations within dashboard UI quality and decisive validation.
criteria.deduction_trigger: Suggests backend changes or buries priorities in an overlong review.
